description: Kinesis Enhanced Fan-Out Waste Detection — Identifies streams paying the EFO premium (dedicated throughput + data retrieval fees) when their processing interval proves no sub-second latency requirement exists

cost.note: Standard Kinesis: $0.015/shard-hour + $0.014/GB ingested. Enhanced Fan-Out ADDS: $0.015/shard-hour (dedicated throughput per consumer-shard) + $0.013/GB retrieved via EFO. Standard GetRecords retrieval is free.

severity_rules.name: unnecessary_enhanced_fan_out
severity_rules.description: Stream has Enhanced Fan-Out enabled but its processing_interval_minutes shows batch processing — no sub-second delivery requirement. EFO adds a per-shard-hour charge and per-GB retrieval fee on top of standard Kinesis pricing. Switching consumers to standard GetRecords polling eliminates these charges entirely with no functional impact on batch workloads.

efo_justification_criteria.note: EFO is only justified when ALL of the following are true
criteria: number of concurrent consumers > 5 (competing for standard 2MB/s/shard read throughput)
iterator_age_ms consistently < 500ms is required by the business SLA
